title: hedeoma oblongifolia
intro: Hedeoma oblongifolia, also known as American pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its carminative and antiseptic properties, which help to alleviate digestive issues and infections. The health benefits of American pennyroyal include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve menstrual cramps, and act as a natural insect repellent. American pennyroyal can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or infused in hot water, and is often used in aromatherapy and natural remedies.
